{"query":"Bayern München PSG 2025/26 UEFA Champions League semi-finals aggregate score result","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1556,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"Paris Saint-Germain will face Arsenal in the 2025-26 Champions League final after the French side advanced past Bayern Munich following a 1-1 draw in Wednesday's semifinal second leg and a 6-5 advantage on aggregate.May 6, 2026"},"results":[{"url":"https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/ousmane-dembele-sends-psg-past-bayern-into-champions-league-final-against-arsenal-180000864.html#:~:text=Paris%20Saint%2DGermain%20will%20face,6%2D5%20advantage%20on%20aggregate.","title":"Ousmane Dembélé sends PSG past Bayern, into Champions League final against Arsenal - Yahoo Sports","content":"Paris Saint-Germain will face Arsenal in the 2025-26 Champions League final after the French side advanced past Bayern Munich following a 1-1 draw in Wednesday's semifinal second leg and a 6-5 advantage on aggregate.
PSG will now face Arsenal in the final on Saturday, May 30, at Puskás Aréna in Budapest.
The Ligue 1 leaders will now move on to the May 30 final against Arsenal and look to win a second straight Champions League title.
Alphonso Davies and Min-Jae Kim come in for Jonathan Tah and Josip Stanišić.
Bradley Barcola enters the match for Ousmane Dembélé.
That man Khvicha Kvaratskhelia is involved in another goal for PSG.
His pass across the Bayern Munich box reaches Ousmane Dembélé, who puts it in the home side’s net for a 1-0 lead to increase their advantage to 6-4 on aggregate.
PSG and Bayern Munich have kicked off in the second leg of their Champions League semifinal.
May 5: Arsenal 1-0 Atlético Madrid (Arsenal advances 2-1 on aggregate)"},{"url":"https://www.espn.com/soccer/match/_/gameId/401862893/bayern-munich-paris-saint-germain","title":"PSG 5-4 Bayern (Apr 28, 2026) Final Score - ESPN","content":"PSG edge Bayern in semifinal 1st-leg classic
Paris Saint-Germain and Bayern Munich produced an epic Champions League semifinal as the French holders claimed a 5-4 first-leg victory at Parc des Princes.
For the past 11 World Cup finals, both Bayern Munich and Inter Milan had been represented."},{"url":"https://www.bundesliga.com/en/bundesliga/news/bayern-munich-1-1-paris-saint-germain-champions-league-match-report-37253","title":"Bayern Munich fall short in UEFA Champions League semi-final with PSG | Bundesliga","content":"May 6, 2026 — Paris Saint-Germain held on to progress to the 2025/26 UEFA Champions League final 6-5 on aggregate. Bayern Munich 1-1 PSG (agg 5-6) Goals: 0-1 ...
Bayern Munich drew on the night, but Paris Saint-Germain held on to progress to the 2025/26 UEFA Champions League final 6-5 on aggregate after a tense second leg at the Allianz Arena.
Vincent Kompany's side needed to overturn a one-goal aggregate deficit, requiring at least two goals to force extra time.
However, the goal came too light as Champions League holders PSG advanced to the final in Budapest, where they will face Arsenal."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026%E2%80%9327_UEFA_Champions_League","title":"2026–27 UEFA Champions League - Wikipedia","content":"The final will be held on 5 June 2027 at Metropolitano Stadium in Madrid, Spain.
It will be the second time Metropolitano Stadium has hosted the UEFA Champions League final after 2019.
The winners of the 2026–27 UEFA Champions League will automatically qualify for the 2027–28 UEFA Champions League league phase, the 2027 FIFA Intercontinental Cup final, the 2029 FIFA Club World Cup group stage and earn the right to play against the winners of the 2026–27 UEFA Europa League in the 2027 UEFA Super Cup.
The winners of the 2025–26 UEFA Champions League and 2025–26 UEFA Europa League are each given an additional entry if they do not qualify for the 2026–27 UEFA Champions League through their domestic league.
League phase — Paris Saint-Germain (1st)TH — Aston Villa (4th)EL — Arsenal (1st) — Manchester City (2nd)
Semi-finals — 27–28 April 2027 — 4–5 May 2027
The draw for the first qualifying round was held on 16 June 2026."}]}
